_note: Drilling specifications for common Israeli-shop joinery. Every number has a source and confidence. Verify against the actual hardware you purchase — manufacturers revise specs. All dimensions mm.

_sources.hafele_minifix: Häfele product pages P-00861332, P-00861333 (hafele.com.de/en); Häfele UK catalog 2014 p.295–305
_sources.confirmat: Snappy Tools 43750 spec; Rockler M7.0×50mm spec; FASTO confirmat sizing guide 2025
_sources.euro_hinge: Blum CLIP top catalog 2022/2023 (publications.blum.com); FineWoodworking forum verified dimensions; WoodWeb verified boring distances
_sources.dowel: Excel Dowel FAQ (exceldowel.com); Australian Wood Review dowel guide; Wolfcraft Ø8mm kit specs

cam_and_dowel.description: KD (knock-down) connector: Ø15mm cam housing in face of one panel, Ø8mm bolt into edge of mating panel. Demountable, hidden under cover cap.

B34.notes: standard; aligns near System-32 front row (37mm)

alignment_dowel.notes: one alignment dowel per cam, 32mm behind it on the System-32 grid

joints_per_panel.rule: 2 cams for panels ≤600mm wide, 3 for 600–1000mm, 4 for >1000mm

confirmat.description: Self-tapping furniture screw through face of one panel into edge of mating panel. Strong, simple, visible head (or capped). Not demountable.
confirmat.unsuitable_note: Weak in plywood edge — use dowels or cam-and-dowel instead

stepped_drill.drill_bit: Confirmat stepped drill 7×50 (Ø5mm pilot + Ø7mm clearance + countersink)

joints_per_panel.rule: same as cam-and-dowel: 2 for ≤600mm, 3 for 600–1000mm, 4 for >1000mm

glued_dowel.description: Fluted hardwood dowel, glued. Permanent joint — not demountable. Needs accurate boring (jig or drill press).

hole.depth_rule: drill 2mm deeper than dowel insertion depth for glue trap
hole.max_face_depth_rule: never deeper than 75% of panel thickness (blowout risk)

glued_dowel.diameter_rule: dowel diameter ≤ ⅓ of thinnest board being joined (Ø8mm for 18mm+ panels)

shelf_pin.description: Adjustable shelf support inserted into System-32 holes.

euro_hinge_35cup.description: Concealed euro hinge with Ø35mm cup. Mounting plate on carcass side at System-32 front row.

mounting_plate.notes: A37 plate (System-32 standard); A20 also exists for face-frame

wall_fixing.description: Wall suspension for built-ins and tall units.

french_cleat.notes: 45° bevel strip; simple, strong. Confirm wall material (בלוק/גבס/בטון) for appropriate screws.

suspension_bracket.notes: Häfele/Camar cabinet hanger; adjustable. Screw pattern per datasheet.

wall_fixing.anti_tip_mandatory: any tall unit in a child's room must be anchored to the wall

_default_by_style._note: Mapping from construction style to default joinery. assembly.py uses this to assign joinery when the user hasn't specified.

frameless_kd.notes: Demountable default for flat-pack / built-in Israeli cabinetry

frameless_permanent.notes: Cheaper, faster, permanent. Common for budget closets.

traditional.notes: For plywood/solid-wood pieces where hidden joints matter
